text:
is a toy based on the Evangelion Production Model-02. It was made as part of the EVANGELION 30th Anniversary x ZOIDS T-SPARK collaboration. The figure was developed by TAKARA TOMY as part of SYNERGENEX series. https://www.takaratomy.co.jp/products/tsparkofficial/synergenex/eva2nd/ 

Profile

Official name:
A machine weaponized by NERV from the Xeno Rex restored from its core. It has the property of resonating only with EVA Unit-02. It can be operated simultaneously with EVA Unit-02 using the Xeno Rex Dummy System, or by its dedicated pilot. A test type machine for NERV's Xeno Rex.
l. It would roar and go out of control during battle. There is also a transparent canopy that was added in the head of Xeno Rex. コアから復元されたゼノレックスがネルフにより兵器化された機体。
エヴァ初号機とのみ共鳴する性質を持つ。
ゼノレックスダミーシステムによるエヴァ初号機と同時の運用、もしくはその専属パイロットによる操縦が可能。
ネルフのゼノレックスとしてはテストタイプにあたる機体。
戦闘中に咆哮し暴走状態になることがあった。 

Weapons

2x Pallet Rifle
2x Progressive Knife for Unit-02
2x Pencil Roc

History

A sphere-like metallic lifeform that glows mysteriously and stirs within the huge GeoFront that spreads beneath the ground of Tokyo-3. They were once discovered along with other metallic skeletons deep in the strata of the Antarctica, and were managed by the special agency NERV. NERV classified this metallic lifeform as a "Core", analyzed it, and planned to convert it into a weapon to annihilate the Angels, due to its property of continuing to emit energy almost indefinitely. As research continued, it was discovered that the Core's unique pulse pattern resonates only with certain individuals of the Multipurpose Humanoid Decisive Weapon, Artificial Human Evangelion. 

It was hoped that this would be an effective countermeasure against the Angels. NERV reused replacement parts for the EVAS that resonated with the metallic lifeform, which had regained its original form,
and named it the Multipurpose Beast-type Decisive Weapon Xeno Rex . 第３新東京市、その地下に広がる巨大なジオフロント内で妖しく光り胎動する球体のような金属生命体。
それらはかつて南極の地層深くから他の金属骨格と共に発見され、特務機関NERV（ネルフ）により管理されていた。
ネルフはこの金属の生命体を「コア」と位置づけ、解析、そしてその半永久的にエネルギーを
放出し続ける性質から、使徒殲滅を目的とした兵器への転用を計画。
研究を続ける中で、コアの固有パルスパターンが汎用ヒト型決戦兵器人造人間エヴァンゲリオンの
特定の個体とのみ共鳴を行うことが判明。 対使徒への有効な対抗手段として期待が寄せられた。
ネルフは共鳴するエヴァ用の換装パーツを流用し、本来の姿を取り戻した金属生命体を
汎用獣型決戦兵器ゼノレックスと呼称した。 

Development

The toy was announced on 14 May 2025 with the unpainted prototype being exhibited on Shizuoka Hobby Show. The reservations started on 03 July 2025, and scheduled for release in late February 2026. The manufacturer's suggested retail price was 6,600 yen (tax included).
